steps.title: Substitute x equals 3/11 into the function
steps.content:
To find $f\left(\frac{3}{11}\right)$, replace $x$ with $\frac{3}{11}$ in the equation $f(x) = x + \frac{8}{11}$:

$$f\left(\frac{3}{11}\right) = \frac{3}{11} + \frac{8}{11}$$

steps.title: Add the fractions with the same denominator
steps.content:
Since both fractions have denominator 11, add the numerators:

$$\frac{3}{11} + \frac{8}{11} = \frac{3+8}{11} = \frac{11}{11} = 1$$

The answer is 1.
